instructions: Register component overrides in `components: {}` inside `starlight({})` in `astro.config.mjs`
Use the exact component name from the Overrides Reference as the key in `components: {}`
Component paths must use relative format starting with `./` (no leading slash)
Import the default component from `@astrojs/starlight/components/<Name>.astro` to wrap instead of replace
Always include `<slot />` inside `<Default>` when wrapping a built-in component
Transfer named slots explicitly on layout components (PageFrame, TwoColumnContent)
Access page data via `Astro.locals.starlightRoute`, not via `Astro.props`
Use `Astro.locals.starlightRoute.id` to check the current page slug
Only override components listed in the official Overrides Reference
Component file name does not determine which slot is overridden — only the config key matters
